structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(compilation_unit
  [
    (class_declaration
      (declaration_list
        [
          (field_declaration
            (variable_declaration
              (variable_declarator
                name: (identifier) @name1)))
          (property_declaration
            name: (identifier) @name2)
          (method_declaration
            name: (identifier) @name3)
        ]))
    (interface_declaration
      (declaration_list
        [
          (property_declaration
            name: (identifier) @name1)
          (method_declaration
            name: (identifier) @name2)
        ]))
    (struct_declaration
      (declaration_list
        [
          (field_declaration
            (variable_declaration
              (variable_declarator
                name: (identifier) @name1)))
          (property_declaration
            name: (identifier) @name2)
        ]))
    (local_declaration_statement
      (variable_declaration
        (variable_declarator
          name: (identifier) @offender)))
    (parameter
      name: (identifier) @offender)
  ]
  (#match? @offender "^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$"))

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (member_access_expression
      expression: (invocation_expression
        function: (member_access_expression
          expression: (identifier) @_process (#eq? @_process "Process")
          name: (identifier) @_method (#eq? @_method "GetCurrentProcess")))
      name: (identifier) @_main_module (#eq? @_main_module "MainModule"))
    name: (identifier) @_file_name (#eq? @_file_name "FileName"))) @offender

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
((invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (member_access_expression
      expression: (invocation_expression
        function: (member_access_expression
          expression: (identifier) @class
          name: (identifier) @parse_method)
        arguments: (_))
      name: (identifier) @root_element)
    name: (_))
  (#eq? @class "JsonDocument")
  (#eq? @parse_method "Parse")
  (#eq? @root_element "RootElement")) @offender)

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (_)
    name: (identifier) @method)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (binary_expression
        left: (_)
        right: (_)))) @offender
  (#match? @method "^(FindAll|FindOne|Search)$"))

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (identifier) @class
    name: (identifier) @method)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (member_access_expression
        expression: (identifier) @enum_type
        name: (identifier) @mode)))
  (#match? @class "^(Aes|DES|TripleDES|RC2)$")
  (#match? @method "^Create$")
  (#match? @enum_type "^CipherMode$")
  (#match? @mode "^(ECB|OFB|CFB)$")) @offender

title: Do not disable certificate validation

title: Do not disable Schannel use of strong crypto
description: Do not disable Schannel use of strong crypto

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (member_access_expression
      expression: (identifier) @registry
      name: (identifier) @set_value)
    name: (identifier))
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (string_literal) @path)
    (argument
      (string_literal) @key)
    (argument
      (integer_literal) @value))
  (#match? @registry "Registry")
  (#match? @set_value "SetValue")
  (#match? @path "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\\\\SYSTEM\\\\CurrentControlSet\\\\Control\\\\SecurityProviders\\\\SCHANNEL")
  (#match? @key "DisableUsingStrongCrypto")
  (#eq? @value "1")) @offender

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(assignment_expression
  left: (member_access_expression
    expression: (identifier) @type
    name: (identifier) @property)
  right: (member_access_expression
    expression: (identifier) @protocol_type
    name: (identifier) @protocol_value)
  (#match? @type "ServicePointManager")
  (#match? @property "SecurityProtocol")
  (#match? @protocol_type "SecurityProtocolType")
  (#match? @protocol_value "(Ssl3|Tls|Tls11)$")) @offender

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(assignment_expression
  left: (member_access_expression
    expression: (_)
    name: (identifier) @prop-name)
  right: (member_access_expression
    expression: (identifier) @enum-type
    name: (identifier) @enum-value)
  (#eq? @prop-name "SharedAccessProtocol")
  (#eq? @enum-type "SharedAccessProtocol")
  (#not-eq? @enum-value "HttpsOnly")) @offender

title: Use container level access policy
description: Use container level access policy

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (_)
    name: (identifier) @method)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (member_access_expression
        expression: (identifier)
        name: (identifier) @access_level)))
  (#match? @method "(SetAccessPolicy|SetPermissions)")
  (#match? @access_level "(Container|Blob)")
) @offender

title: Do not disable ServicePointManagerSecurityProtocols
description: Do not disable ServicePointManagerSecurityProtocols

title: Do not use weak key derivation function algorithm
description: Do not use weak key derivation function algorithm

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    name: (identifier) @func_name
    (#match? @func_name "^(GetBytes|DeriveKey)$"))
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (invocation_expression
        function: (member_access_expression
          expression: (identifier) @class
          name: (identifier) @method)
        (#match? @class "^(Rfc2898DeriveBytes|PasswordDeriveBytes)$")
        (#eq? @method "new"))))) @offender

description: Do not add certificates to root store

title: Ensure certificates are not added to root store

title: Use secure cookies in ASP.NET Core
description: Use secure cookies in ASP.NET Core

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (identifier) @cookie_name
    name: (identifier) @append_method
    (#match? @append_method "^Append$"))
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (object_creation_expression
        type: (identifier) @cookie_options
        (#eq? @cookie_options "CookieOptions")
        initializer: (initializer_expression
          (assignment_expression
            left: (identifier) @secure_prop
            (#eq? @secure_prop "Secure")
            right: (boolean_literal) @secure_val
            (#eq? @secure_val "false"))))) @offender))

title: Ensure use secure cookies in ASP.NET Core
description: Ensure use secure cookies in ASP.NET Core

title: Do not use digital signature algorithm (DSA)

description: Use Rivest–Shamir–Adleman (RSA) algorithm with sufficient key size

title: Avoid hardcoding SecurityProtocolType value
description: Avoid hardcoding SecurityProtocolType value

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(assignment_expression
  left: (member_access_expression
    expression: (identifier) @type (#eq? @type "ServicePointManager")
    name: (identifier) @property (#eq? @property "SecurityProtocol"))
  right: [
    (member_access_expression
      expression: (identifier) @enum_type (#eq? @enum_type "SecurityProtocolType")
      name: (identifier))
    (binary_expression
      left: (member_access_expression
        expression: (identifier) @enum_type_left (#eq? @enum_type_left "SecurityProtocolType"))
      right: (member_access_expression
        expression: (identifier) @enum_type_right (#eq? @enum_type_right "SecurityProtocolType")))
  ]) @offender

title: Do not use weak key derivation function with insufficient iteration count
description: Do not use weak key derivation function with insufficient iteration count

description: Ensure sufficient iteration count when using weak key derivation function

title: Do not add archive item's path to the target file system path
description: Do not add archive item's path to the target file system path

structuralHints.treeSitterQuery:
(invocation_expression
  function: (member_access_expression
    expression: (_)
    name: (identifier) @method_name)
  arguments: (argument_list
    (argument
      (member_access_expression
        name: (identifier) @prop1))
    (argument
      (member_access_expression
        name: (identifier) @prop2)))
  (#match? @method_name "^(Combine|Join)$")
  (#match? @prop1 "^(FullName|Name)$")
  (#match? @prop2 "^(FullName|Name)$")) @offender
